headline: Forget Lockheed Martin. This Defense Stock Will Double by 2028.
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) dominates financial media, riding a record backlog and climbing stock price. Every defense analyst touts it. Lockheed’s story is real, but it’s priced in. The stock has climbed 24.21% over the past year and trades at a trailing P/E of roughly 26x on full-year 2025 EPS of $21.49. For a defense contractor ... Forget Lockheed Martin. This Defense Stock Will Double by 2028.

headline: Defense Is Less ‘Defensive’ Now. Why Sector Stocks Are Getting Crushed.
summary: The aerospace and defense sector has been a standout lately, free from AI disruption fears and boosted by higher demand for commercial air travel and global defense spending.  Investors probably have some time to wait before the skies clear.  Lockheed Martin  stock was down 3% in midday trading, on pace for its lowest close since January, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: QuantumScape Adds Defense Technologist Maybury To Guide Commercialization Path
summary: QuantumScape (NasdaqGS:QS) has appointed Dr. Mark Maybury to its strategic advisory board. Dr. Maybury brings experience from Lockheed Martin and senior roles within the U.S. Air Force. QuantumScape, trading at $6.98, has delivered mixed returns, with shares up 80.4% over the past year but down 36.9% year to date and 81.4% over five years. Against that backdrop, adding Dr. Maybury signals a focus on execution and commercialization as the company works to translate its battery technology...

headline: Down 6.3% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why Lockheed (LMT) Looks Ripe for a Turnaround
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for Lockheed (LMT) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.
